entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/awesome-privacy#504 · April 17, 2026 05:50
Add VirtualSMS in Virtual Phone Numbers #504

Type

Addition

Changes

Adds VirtualSMS to Communication → Virtual Phone Numbers. It sits alongside SMSPool, MoneroSMS, PikaSim, and Narayana already…
